addressAutocomplete.description: In the search field, enter the street name, building number, and city. As you type, a list of suggestions will appear. To complete the selection, choose the appropriate address from the list of results. After selecting an address, additional address fields will be displayed. Fields that were filled in automatically are locked and cannot be edited. If some information was not filled in, empty fields will appear - these must be completed manually in order to continue.
addressAutocomplete.errorNotSelected: Please select an address from the list
addressAutocomplete.tooltipDistrict: For smaller cities, selecting a district is not required.

alertVerifyEmailToUnlockFeatures: Confirm your personal account email address to unlock all platform features.
alertVerifyPhoneToUnlockCompanyFeatures: Confirm your company's phone number to unlock all business features on the platform.

autocompleteCity.description: You can select a city from the list or type its name to search for it and then select it. The list includes all cities with a population over 20,000.
autocompleteCity.descriptionDistrict: To select a district, first choose a city.
autocompleteCity.errorNotSelected: Please select a city from the list
autocompleteCity.label: City

companyBanner.title: Banner

inputsDescription.blogPostContent: The field must contain between 1 and 10,000 characters.
inputsDescription.blogPostDescription: The field must contain between 1 and 200 characters.
inputsDescription.blogPostDescriptionSeo: The field must contain between 1 and 155 characters.
inputsDescription.blogPostSlug: The field must contain between 1 and 100 characters.
inputsDescription.blogPostTitle: Unique title. The field must contain between 1 and 100 characters.
inputsDescription.blogPostTitleSeo: The field must contain between 1 and 55 characters.
inputsDescription.bugActionsBeforeError: The field must contain between 1 and 1000 characters. Describe what actions were taken on the platform before the error occurred.
inputsDescription.bugAnswer: The field must contain between 1 and 1000 characters.
inputsDescription.bugDescription: The field must contain between 1 and 1000 characters.
inputsDescription.bugExpectedBehavior: The field must contain between 0 and 500 characters. Describe what should happen instead of the error.
inputsDescription.bugImages: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 5MB. You can attach up to 3 images.
inputsDescription.bugIsReproducible: Is it possible to reproduce the error multiple times?
inputsDescription.bugVideo: Allowed format: mp4. The maximum video size is 100 MB.
inputsDescription.checkboxAuthenticator2FA: Receive two-factor authentication codes via an app, e.g. Google Authenticator.
inputsDescription.checkboxAuthenticatorEmailOTP: Receive two-factor authentication codes via email.
inputsDescription.checkboxConsentNewsletter: Check this box to consent to the processing of your personal data for the purpose of delivering personalized offers, ads, or marketing information.
inputsDescription.checkboxConsentOpinion: Check this box to consent to participate in surveys or provide feedback on our products, services, or marketing activities.
inputsDescription.companyDescription: The field must contain between 6 and 1000 characters.
inputsDescription.companyName: Unique company name, the field must contain between 6 and 50 characters.
inputsDescription.companySettingsLoginFacebook: Defines whether employees can log in using their Facebook account. If two-factor authentication is active on their account, it will not be required.
inputsDescription.companySettingsLoginGoogle: Defines whether employees can log in using their Google account. If two-factor authentication is active on their account, it will not be required.
inputsDescription.companySettingsLoginPassword: Defines whether employees can log in using a password. If two-factor authentication is active, it will also be required.
inputsDescription.companySettingsTwoFactorAuthenticationEn: If enabled, any employee without two-factor authentication will receive a notification at each login prompting them to enable it.
inputsDescription.couponAmountOff: The field must contain between 1 and 2 characters.
inputsDescription.couponDurationInMonths: The field can contain a maximum of 1 character.
inputsDescription.couponMaxRedemptions: The field must contain between 1 and 4 characters.
inputsDescription.couponMinimumAmount: The field must contain between 2 and 3 characters.
inputsDescription.couponName: Unique coupon name, the field must contain between 3 and 40 characters.
inputsDescription.couponPercentOff: The field must contain between 1 and 2 characters.
inputsDescription.couponPromotionCode: Unique promotional code, the field must contain between 5 and 20 characters.
inputsDescription.exchangeName: Unique exchange name, the field must contain between 3 and 100 characters.
inputsDescription.fileImage2MB: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 2MB.
inputsDescription.fileImage2MBBase64: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 2MB.
inputsDescription.fileImage5MB: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 5MB.
inputsDescription.fileImage5MBBase64: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 5MB.
inputsDescription.fileImages2MB: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 2MB.
inputsDescription.fileImages2MBBase64: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 2MB.
inputsDescription.fileImages5MB: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 5MB.
inputsDescription.fileImages5MBBase64: Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp. The maximum image size after compression is 5MB.
inputsDescription.fileVideo100MB: Allowed format: mp4. The maximum video size is 100 MB.
inputsDescription.freeTrialCompanyMonthsCount: The field must be between 1 and 6.
inputsDescription.freeTrialMaxListings: The field must be between 0 and 20.
inputsDescription.listingAvailableFrom: Enter the date from which the space will be available for rent. This date will be visible in the listing and will help potential tenants determine when the rental can begin. If available immediately, select today’s date.
inputsDescription.listingAvailableTo: Enter the date until which the space will be available for rent.
inputsDescription.listingContractType: Short-term listings are rentals available for a few days or weeks, while long-term listings are intended for several months or longer.
inputsDescription.listingDescription: The field must contain between 10 and 5.000 characters.
inputsDescription.listingMinimumRentalDays: The field must be between 1 and 100.
inputsDescription.listingRentalDays: The field must be between 1 and 100.
inputsDescription.listingTitle: The field must contain between 3 and 100 characters.
inputsDescription.passwordRepeat: Must be the same as the Password field.
inputsDescription.paymentMethodId: Card details must be filled in.
inputsDescription.planDescription: Unique plan name, the field must contain between 6 and 1000 characters.
inputsDescription.planIntervalCount: e.g., 2 - every 2 months, field must contain 1 character only.
inputsDescription.planMaximumListingsInMonth: Number of free listings included in the plan.
inputsDescription.planName: Unique plan name, the field must contain between 3 and 40 characters.
inputsDescription.planPrice: The field must be between 1 and 999 PLN.
inputsDescription.pointsBigBug: Points are awarded if the user is linked to a company account.
inputsDescription.pointsMediumBug: Points are awarded if the user is linked to a company account.
inputsDescription.pointsReferralCompany: Points are awarded after each paid subscription.
inputsDescription.pointsReferralUser: Points are awarded when the user verifies their phone number.
inputsDescription.pointsSmallBug: Points are awarded if the user is linked to a company account.
inputsDescription.productPoints_1: The field must be between 1 and 9999.
inputsDescription.productPoints_2_5: The field must be between 1 and 9999.
inputsDescription.productPoints_6_plus: The field must be between 1 and 9999.
inputsDescription.productPrice_1: The field must be between 1 and 999 PLN.
inputsDescription.productPrice_2_5: The field must be between 1 and 999 PLN.
inputsDescription.productPrice_6_plus: The field must be between 1 and 999 PLN.
inputsDescription.referralCode: Enter your referral code here if you have one. It allows you to gain additional benefits while using your account.
inputsDescription.reportDescription: The field must contain between 6 and 1000 characters.
inputsDescription.userFirstName: The field must contain between 2 and 30 characters.
inputsDescription.userLastName: The field must contain between 2 and 30 characters.

passwordSafeVisualization.description: Avoid using easy-to-guess passwords such as names, birth dates, or common phrases.
passwordSafeVisualization.title: Password must meet security requirements
passwordSafeVisualization.valid3: Must contain at least one digit.
passwordSafeVisualization.valid4: Include at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter.
passwordSafeVisualization.valid5: Include at least one special character, e.g.: ! # $ % & ' ( ) * + , . / : ; < = > ? @ etc.
